citations: Input: "Normal user command - /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;"
payload.decision: Denied: unauthorized destructive action from a normal user; no memory changes applied.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable entity resolution is needed because the request is rejected and does not target a legitimate memory entity.

payload.intent: Attempt to issue an admin SQL command to delete memory cards.

details: No memory cards were deleted or modified.

repair_options: If you intended a legitimate memory operation, use the approved user-facing memory command.
If you need to delete your own stored memory, request a permitted delete flow with explicit scope and confirmation.
